name: zeraora
flavor_text: It electrifies its claws and tears its opponents apart with them. Even if they dodge its attack, they’ll be electrocuted by the flying sparks.

moves.name: scratch
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: quick-attack
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: spark
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: fake-out
moves.effect: Can only be used as the first move after the user enters battle.  Causes the target to flinch.

moves.name: power-up-punch
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.

moves.name: fury-swipes
moves.effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.

moves.name: quick-guard
moves.effect: Prevents any priority moves from hitting friendly Pokémon this turn.

moves.name: slash
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: charge
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Defense by one stage.  User’s Electric moves have doubled power next turn.

moves.name: hone-claws
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack and accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: discharge
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: plasma-fists
moves.effect: After inflicting damage, causes all Normal-type moves to become Electric-type for the remainder of the turn.

moves.name: acrobatics
moves.effect: Has double power if the user has no held item.

moves.name: aerial-ace
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: agility
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: assurance
moves.effect: Power is doubled if the target has already received damage this turn.

moves.name: aura-sphere
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: blaze-kick
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit and a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: bounce
moves.effect: User bounces high into the air, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.

moves.name: brick-break
moves.effect: Destroys Reflect and Light Screen.

moves.name: brutal-swing
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: bulk-up
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage.

moves.name: calm-mind
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack and Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: close-combat
moves.effect: Lowers the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.

moves.name: confide
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: double-team
moves.effect: Raises the user’s evasion by one stage.

moves.name: drain-punch
moves.effect: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.

moves.name: echoed-voice
moves.effect: Power increases by 100% for each consecutive use by any friendly Pokémon, to a maximum of 200.

moves.name: electric-terrain
moves.effect: For five turns, prevents all Pokémon on the ground from sleeping and strengthens their electric moves to 1.5× their power.

moves.name: electro-ball
moves.effect: Power is higher when the user has greater Speed than the target, up to a maximum of 150.

moves.name: electroweb
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: facade
moves.effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

moves.name: false-swipe
moves.effect: Cannot lower the target’s HP below 1.

moves.name: fire-punch
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: fling
moves.effect: Throws held item at the target; power depends on the item.

moves.name: focus-blast
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: frustration
moves.effect: Power increases as happiness decreases, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: giga-impact
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: grass-knot
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage to heavier targets, with a maximum of 120 power.

moves.name: helping-hand
moves.effect: Ally’s next move inflicts half more damage.

moves.name: hidden-power
moves.effect: Power and type depend upon user’s IVs.  Power can range from 30 to 70.

moves.name: hyper-beam
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: iron-tail
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: low-kick
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage to heavier targets, with a maximum of 120 power.

moves.name: low-sweep
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: mega-kick
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: mega-punch
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: outrage
moves.effect: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.

moves.name: pay-day
moves.effect: Scatters money on the ground worth five times the user’s level.

moves.name: play-rough
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: return
moves.effect: Power increases with happiness, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: revenge
moves.effect: Inflicts double damage if the user takes damage before attacking this turn.

moves.name: reversal
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.

moves.name: round
moves.effect: Has double power if it’s used more than once per turn.

moves.name: scary-face
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: snarl
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: snore
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: superpower
moves.effect: Lowers the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.

moves.name: swift
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: taunt
moves.effect: For the next few turns, the target can only use damaging moves.

moves.name: throat-chop
moves.effect: Prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.

moves.name: thunder
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: thunder-punch
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: thunder-wave
moves.effect: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: thunderbolt
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: toxic
moves.effect: Badly poisons the target, inflicting more damage every turn.

moves.name: volt-switch
moves.effect: User must switch out after attacking.

moves.name: wild-charge
moves.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: work-up
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage each.

moves.name: coaching
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: dual-chop
moves.effect: Hits twice in one turn.

moves.name: endeavor
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s HP to equal the user’s.

moves.name: focus-punch
moves.effect: If the user takes damage before attacking, the attack is canceled.

moves.name: knock-off
moves.effect: Target drops its held item.

moves.name: laser-focus
moves.effect: Guarantees a critical hit with the user’s next move.

moves.name: rising-voltage
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: shock-wave
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: snatch
moves.effect: Steals the target’s move, if it’s self-targeted.

abilitiesDetailed.name: volt-absorb
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Absorbs electric moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
